manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Hamburg
TO: Stuttgart
BY: Overnight bus
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: Next Sunday

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Hamburg
TO: Stuttgart
BY: Overnight bus
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: Next Sunday

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Hamburg
TO: Stuttgart
BY: Overnight bus
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: Next Sunday

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Hamburg
TO: Stuttgart
BY: Overnight bus
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: Next Sunday

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Hamburg
TO: Stuttgart
BY: Overnight bus
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: Next Sunday

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: TRAVEL-AGENT: What is the date of departure?
ANSWER: The departure date is next Sunday.
ME: Please answer this question carefully. Does the travel agent already know whether you go by plane or by train? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

message.reasoning:

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Hamburg
TO: Stuttgart
BY: Overnight bus
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: Next Sunday

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Hamburg
TO: Stuttgart
BY: Overnight bus
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: Next Sunday

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: The departure date is next Sunday.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Where are you going to?

TRAVEL-AGENT: What kind of transportation do you want to use?
ANSWER: I want to travel by overnight bus.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Should I book first, business or economy class?
ANSWER: I would like to book economy class.
TRAVEL-AGENT: Where are you departing from?
ANSWER: I am departing from Hamburg.
ME:  Does the travel agent know when your trip starts? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.
